LCC-MS8-L3-6501000-MSMATH8-TRT-NAV-02 | Deck B | Trend Tracker | North American Voices | Functions (definition, evaluation, comparison)

The Bloom Counter

Click   🎧   to listen.
Listen to a conversation between a girl and a boy. Listen carefully. You will hear the conversation only once. After listening, you will answer some questions.
Listen to the Conversation
1 QUESTION 1: What is the girl doing on the Trend Tracker?
2 QUESTION 2: Why are the two students getting different counts for the same week?
3 QUESTION 3: What will the students probably do next?
Choose the best answer for each question. You may change your answers before submitting.
Answer all 3 questions to submit.
